name: EeveeSpotify
subtitle: Spotify Enhancement
description: This tweak makes Spotify think you have a Premium subscription, granting free listening, just like Spotilife, and provides some additional features like custom lyrics.

apps.name: EeveeSpotify
apps.subtitle: Spotify Premium Enhancement
apps.localizedDescription:
# Release Notes:

Improved :
- Support for Spotify 9.1.50
- Improved AdBlocking
- CarPlay functionality

New Features:
- App Icon Switcher
- SponsorBlock
- All lyric Providers working again
- True Shuffle

Patched vs Not Patched
Use patched if you use a paid cert or troll store

Use the non patched one for other methods like Sideloadly/Altstore/Sidestore

Credits for this update:

[Ryuk](https://github.com/faroukbmiled) - True Shuffle, App Icon, crash fixes

[Mod4](https://github.com/M0d-4) - Custom Lyrics, iPadUI fix 

[estrogencat](https://github.com/estrogencat) - Icon Fixes 



**Join [TG channel](https://t.me/compiledipas) to recieve more frequent updates**

**Orion Framework is provided in Orion.zip for those who need it**

**View txt file**
